debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
p_large_enough : Fact (p > 512)
programSize : ℕ
inst✝¹ : NeZero programSize
program : Fin programSize → F p
h_programSize : programSize < p
memorySize : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero memorySize
memory : Fin memorySize → F p
h_memorySize : memorySize < p
⊢ InductiveTable.Completeness (F p) State unit (fun x x => True) (fun x => True)
    (fun initial_state x i x state =>
      @Examples.FemtoCairo.nextStateCircuit.match_3 p (fun x => Prop)
        (Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i)
        (fun reachedState => state = reachedState) fun _ => False)
    fun state x =>
    (fun input =>
        subcircuitWithAssertion
          (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program h_programSize
            memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
          input)
      state

proof:
intros
    <;> simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
    <;> try tauto
    <;> try contradiction
    <;> try simp_all [circuit_norm]
failed_attempts:
intros initial_state i
    induction i with
    | zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try simp_all [Option.bind]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    | succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at *
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try simp_all [Option.bind]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try {
        cases' ih with reached_state h_reached
        simp_all [Option.bind]
        <;>
        (try aesop)
      })

intros initial_state
    have h := @InductiveTable.completeness_of_trivial_spec_and_completeness_of_circuit _ _ _ _
      (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize)
      (by simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions])
      (by
        intro state
        apply Exists.intro (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize state)
        <;> simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try aesop)
      )
    exact h

intros initial_state i h1
    simp_all [InductiveTable complem]

intros initial_state i
    -- We can directly use the step function to construct the proof
    have h : (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness := by
      -- Prove that the step circuit is complete
      exact (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
    -- Use the completeness of the step circuit to construct the inductive table proof
    induction i with
    | zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
      <;> aesop
    | succ i ih =>
      simp_all [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, InductiveTable.step]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          exfalso
          simp_all [femtoCairoStepCircuit]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [femtoCairoStepCircuit]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [femtoCairoStepCircuit]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [femtoCairoStepCircuit]
          <;>
          aesop
        })

intro i
  induction i with
  | zero =>
    intro initial_state
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try aesop)
  | succ i ih =>
    intro initial_state
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try aesop)

intros initial_state i state h_spec
    have h₁ : True := by trivial
    trivial

{
      use 3
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 4
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 5
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 6
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 7
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 8
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 9
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 10
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      use 0, 0, 0
      <;>
      simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
successful_attempts:
intros
    <;> simp_all [femtoCairoAssumptions]
    <;> try tauto
    <;> try contradiction
    <;> try simp_all [circuit_norm]
